title: ShieldStatuses Enhanced + Punchy fix
description: unofficial addon for shieldstatuses + punchy compatibility fix
body:
This unofficial addon for **Shield Statuses** expands the original mod's logic to enable global shield tracking. Instead of only updating when you personally break an opponent's shield, it now processes all shield breaks within render distance for all players. 

![global shield tracking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39ebe2859eb1c14097e6bbe4efa6197efad4e444.png) 
![global shield tracking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/234f2b0f7f3059112c0bbe2f66357d2d988adbd2.png)

Additionally, it includes a compatibility fix for the **Punchy** mod. Previously, disabling an opponent's shield while using Punchy would mistakenly trigger the cooldown visual on your own screen. This addon completely resolves the conflict, ensuring all shield statuses are rendered accurately.

![punchy fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27c26ec0475aa66850ea6b259901dd1f6a6b06c2.png)
![punchy fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/543a3f4da7ba65746ffb9c6940e44011467bc210.png)
